theme_strategy.core_palette_description: Indigo/Electric Blue accent on warm off-white background. The aesthetic is clean, fast, and elegant, inspired by Linear, Notion, and AudioPen (but specifically avoiding AudioPen's orange). Uses subtle glassmorphism and deep soft shadows.

typography.strategy: Serif display for hero titles (AudioPen style) for elegance, geometric sans-serif for UI clarity.

floating_record_fab.style: borderRadius full, bg primary, shadow lg
floating_record_fab.interaction: Pulse animation on recording, scale down on press

note_card.layout: bg surface, padding lg, borderRadius xl, marginBottom md
note_card.content_hierarchy: Date (caption, text_tertiary) -> Title (h3, text_primary) -> Excerpt (body, text_secondary, 2 lines max)

waveform.style: multiple bars, width 4px, marginHorizontal 2px, borderRadius full, bg primary
waveform.animation: Reanimated height variation based on audio metering or math.sin loop

style_picker_bottom_sheet.layout: absolute bottom, width 100%, bg surface, borderTopRadius 2xl, padding lg
style_picker_bottom_sheet.items: Row layout, icon + text, selected state has bg primary_light and text primary with checkmark icon

tab_pills.container: row, bg surface_muted, padding xs, borderRadius full, alignSelf flex-start
tab_pills.unselected: transparent bg, text_secondary, paddingVertical sm, paddingHorizontal lg
tab_pills.selected: bg surface, text_primary, shadow sm, borderRadius full

paywall_pricing_card.layout: bg surface, padding lg, borderRadius xl, borderWidth 2
paywall_pricing_card.content: Tier name (caption), Price (h2), features list with checkmarks

1_Splash.layout: Center logo and brand name. Background: background
1_Splash.animation: Reanimated fade-in and slight scale up

2_Onboarding.layout: FlatList pager. Top 50% image, bottom 50% content (Title h1, description body_lg).
2_Onboarding.controls: Bottom row: Skip (text_tertiary) and Next (primary button, rounded full)

3_Login.layout: Safe area padding lg. Large Title 'Welcome to SprintNote'.
3_Login.buttons: Continue with Email (primary), Continue with Google (surface, border border_light, Google icon)

4_Dashboard.filters: Search bar (bg surface_muted), Tab pills (All, Folders, Favorites).
4_Dashboard.overlay: Floating Record FAB at bottom center. Pill indicator '12/50 notes saved' near top or bottom.

5_Recording.layout: Glassmorphism modal over Dashboard (absolute fill, bg white/90, blur).
5_Recording.content: Top: Output language selector. Center: Timer (h1), Waveform. Bottom: Pause/Resume, Stop (large primary), Cancel.

6_Processing.layout: Centered layout. Animated spinner or abstract wave.

7_Note_Detail.header: Back arrow, 'Private' badge, Share icon, Menu dots.
7_Note_Detail.content: ScrollView. Date (caption). Title (h1 display font). Transcript (body_lg, text_primary, loose line height).
7_Note_Detail.overlay: Bottom right floating 'Magic Wand' FAB to open Style Picker bottom sheet.

8_Search.header: Auto-focused search input (large). Cancel text right.
8_Search.content: Recent searches list or horizontal tags. Filtered Note Cards list below.

9_Premium_Paywall.layout: Modal presentation. Hero abstract image. Title 'Unlock SprintNote Pro'.
9_Premium_Paywall.content: Toggle (Monthly/Annual). Pricing Cards. Features list. CTA Button (large, primary).

10_Settings.layout: Grouped list style. Section headers (uppercase, small, text_tertiary).
10_Settings.items: Row items: Icon + Label + ChevronRight. E.g., Account, Default Style, Export Format, Sign Out.

animations.fab_pulse: useAnimatedStyle: scale 1 -> 1.1, withRepeat, withTiming(1000). Absolute positioning behind main FAB.
animations.card_press: useAnimatedStyle: scale -> 0.97 on pressIn, return to 1 on pressOut. Spring config (mass 1, damping 15).
animations.skeleton_shimmer: LinearGradient absolute fill, translateX from -100% to 100%, withRepeat, withTiming(1500).
animations.bottom_sheet: Slide up from bottom using translateY, interpolate background overlay opacity 0 -> 0.4.
animations.page_transitions: Expo Router 'fade' or custom slide from right.

onboarding_images.description: Abstract flowing blue and white fabric texture for Onboarding Page 1 (Capture Magic)
Minimalist pencils in cup on desk for Onboarding Page 2 (Structure & Clean)
Clean, modern minimalist room with desk for Onboarding Page 3 (Organized Life)

instructions_to_main_agent: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='record-fab').
Adhere STRICTLY to the light theme. DO NOT introduce dark mode tokens or dark backgrounds.
Use Newsreader or Playfair Display for massive, elegant H1/H2 titles. Use Inter/Geist for all other UI text.
Do not use default React Native Button. Build custom pressables with Reanimated scale effects.
The primary color #4F46E5 must be used strategically for CTAs and the active recording state. Never use orange.
Shadows should be soft and diffuse (large shadowRadius, low shadowOpacity) to achieve the 'Linear' premium feel.
Ensure all components are thoroughly responsive across iOS and Android screen sizes using Flexbox.
